76e372d9031cd83fc647cbe78259a9c1dab3a915.raw: {"dialogue": "listen", "ops": [{"type":"launch","fn":"schedule_payment","args":{"payee":"物业","amount":800,"date":"June 1"}}], "say": "好的，已安排6月1日向物业支付800元。"}

842151bf0824fbe248fab08d673a542f71aa7442.raw: {"dialogue": "listen", "ops": [{"type":"patch","op_id":0,"diff":{"max_rent":8000}}], "say": "好的，已将月租上限调整为八千。"}

1c50d6b49034ec6bff275fdc39cdd59cb77803e6.raw: {"dialogue": "listen", "ops": [{"type":"patch","op_id":1,"diff":{"beds":2}},{"type":"launch","fn":"book_viewing","args":{"listing_id":"$RESULT_1.listings[0].id","slot":"Saturday morning"}}], "say": "Updating that to two bedrooms and booking a viewing for Saturday morning."}

1f560c7e8e7f17ccc7e2be793962e8981dd13a02.raw: {"dialogue": "listen", "ops": [{"type":"patch","op_id":0,"diff":{"amount":5000}},{"type":"patch","op_id":1,"diff":{"amount":5000}}],"say":"Updating the amount to 5,000 for both the currency quote and transfer."}
